title: sort
html:
sort

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

sort -m /path/to/input-file

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo DATA | sort -m -o /path/to/output-file
excerpt: sort File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged sort -m /path/to/input-file File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo DATA | sort -m -o /path/to/output-file
